Subject: //A/C DAVA - 40K-UMX DELY NCHINA/KOREA RANGE TO NORTH BRAZIL //

DATE   : 10TH NOVEMBER 2025
REF    : IBC/AV/005

===

GD DAY

HAVE FOLL TO FIX:

ACCT DAVA SINGAPORE
40K DWT UP TO ULTRA,GEARED
DEL NCHINA/KOREA RANGE
1TCT WITH STEELS/GENERALS
13/19TH NOV
DUR ABT 70DAYS WOG
REDL NORTH BRAZIL
ADD COM 3.75 PCT PUS

TRY PERIOD

BEST REGARDS
